task: Fix a localized bug: stopword case-normalization dropped (stopwords_lower = list(stopwords) instead of [s.lower() for s in stopwords]), breaking 3 real tests (case-insensitive stopword match + unicode stopword).
rationale: pytest exit status: control=0 (82 passed), treatment=0 (82 passed) — both arms fixed the bug; verified independently by the controller, not from agent self-report.
control_reads: 1 source read of slugify.py, then fixed (full source on disk).

tokens.net_vs_control: +23.3% (treatment read summary THEN escaped to full source — a fix task needs the file)

honest_note: A FIX task is the boundary case: the treatment agent must open the file to patch it, so the gate adds the summary ON TOP of the source it still reads. Accuracy is preserved (the keymd_read_full escape works; both arms pass real tests), but on a surgical fix keymd is a net token COST, not a save. The token lever lives on navigation/comprehension work (the agent answers WITHOUT opening), per the S1 battery — not on edits that require the source.
